list.name: datasource
list.label: Postgres datasource
list.description: Datasource pointing at the OHSHEET_EVAL_TELEMETRY_DSN database.

list.name: q_version
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT q_version AS __value FROM eval_production_quality_scores ORDER BY q_version DESC
list.label: Q version

panels.title: Production composite-Q (per-job, last 7d)
panels.description: Per-job composite quality score from backend.eval.telemetry. Strategy doc §8.2.

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at AS time, composite_quality_score AS value, 'composite_q' AS metric FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND q_version = '$q_version' ORDER BY created_at

panels.title: Production composite-Q distribution (histogram)
panels.description: Distribution of composite_q over the visible time window. Look for left-skew or bimodality.

targets.rawSql: SELECT composite_quality_score FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND q_version = '$q_version'

panels.title: Tier 3 — playability fraction (mean per hour)
panels.description: Hourly mean of tier3_playability_fraction. Strategy doc §2.3 — fraction of chords with span ≤14 st AND ≤5 notes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(tier3_playability_fraction) AS value, 'playability' AS metric FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND tier3_playability_fraction IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tier 3 — voice-leading smoothness (mean per hour)
panels.description: Hourly mean of tier3_voice_leading_smoothness. 1.0 = static voicing; 0.0 = octave jumps every chord. Strategy doc §2.3.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(tier3_voice_leading_smoothness) AS value, 'voice_leading' AS metric FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND tier3_voice_leading_smoothness IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tier 3 — sight-readability (mean per hour)
panels.description: Hourly mean of tier3_sight_readability — composite heuristic over playability + vleading + warning density. Strategy doc §2.3, RubricNet stand-in.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(tier3_sight_readability) AS value, 'sight_readability' AS metric FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND tier3_sight_readability IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tier 2 — chord-symbol presence rate (per hour)
panels.description: Fraction of jobs that emitted ≥1 chord symbol. Drops here mean Phase 2's chord-symbol plumbing regressed. Strategy doc §2.2.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN tier2_chord_symbol_count > 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS value, 'chord_symbol_rate' AS metric FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tier 3 — engraving warnings per job (mean)
panels.description: Hourly mean count of engraving warnings (ledger-line excess, voice crossing, hand crossing). Higher = scarier scores.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', created_at) AS time, AVG(tier3_engraving_warning_count) AS value, 'engraving_warnings' AS metric FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND tier3_engraving_warning_count IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Engrave route mix (per day)
panels.description: Local vs. remote_http vs. remote_http_fallback split, per day.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, engrave_route AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND engrave_route IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Recent low-quality jobs (Q < 0.55)
panels.description: Bottom-20 by composite_q in the visible window. Click into a job_id to debug.

targets.rawSql: SELECT created_at, job_id, title, composite_quality_score, tier3_playability_fraction, tier2_chord_symbol_count, engrave_route FROM eval_production_quality_scores WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND composite_quality_score < 0.55 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
